I understand the emphasis placed on Artemether plus lumefantrine by many experts because of its broad spectrum activity against multidrug-resistant parasites. However, while it’s ideal, we must consider practicalities. In regions with limited infrastructure or supplies, ensuring timely delivery can be challenging. Moreover, first-line treatments often rely more heavily on widely accessible drugs which reduce complications related to delayed care. Therefore, if Artemether-lumefantrine faces distribution hurdles, using an effective but less complex regimen becomes crucial to maintain high cure rates without exacerbating delays in treatment.
